# Hung Vo | Portfolio

Architecting secure, autonomous, and scalable ecosystems through Agentic AI and Cloud Security.

## Profile Summary

- **Name**: Hung Vo
- **Roles**: DevSecOps Engineer, AI Engineer
- **Specialties**: Agentic AI, Cloud Security, Kubernetes, Zero-Trust Architecture
- **Location**: Vietnam
- **Contact**: [Email](mailto:hung@atas.tech) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hungvotrung/) | [GitHub](https://github.com/tuthan)

## Experience Background

- **Freelance AI & DevOps (05/2025 - Present)**: Researching Agentic AI and Development.
- **Lead DevSecOps Engineer (11/2022 - 04/2025)**: Multi-region CI/CD, FinOps, Compliance.
- **Security Manager (12/2021 - 06/2022)**: SIEM and Security Audits.

## Notable Projects

- **BlindPass**: Zero-knowledge secret provisioning for AI agents. Uses HPKE RFC 9180.
- **Multi-Region CI/CD Pipeline**: Terraform and ArgoCD for AWS/Azure clusters.
- **Zero-Trust SIEM Integration**: Wazuh and Suricata for SOC 2 compliance.

## Technical Skills

- **Agentic AI**: Agentic Development, Model Context Protocols (MCP), LLM Security.
- **Cloud Infrastructure**: Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, Azure.
- **Cyber Security**: SOC 2, ISO 27001, SIEM (Wazuh), Threat Detection.
- **DevOps**: CI/CD (GitHub Actions, ArgoCD), GitOps, FinOps.
